helpful: Relist and fee-class cuts in the committed statpack
gaps: Ranged corpus priors were unavailable because the remote endpoint could not resolve
Only one of several filed briefs in opposition was provisioned
notes: The provisioned docket and filings were sufficient to finish. The corpus query failed before returning rows, so the forecast used committed aggregate base rates rather than retrieved case-level priors. The provisioned opposition contained its complete main brief but was marked truncated because of its lengthy appendix.
